Fun stuff. Today shall be long. Send any appreciation on discord, same username. Smooches.

item.title: I will never understand how someone can get that angry
item.dc:creator: PiercedViking

item.title: PB & Marcy - Adventure Time Cosplay
item.description:
Me and me being PB and Marcy :D Still one of my favorite shoots ever. I want to try and pull off a double cosplay like this again soon cause it was such a fun challenge but I definitely need ideas!
Princess Bubblegum and Marcy are adorable
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: "And I'll do it again, too!" - Aubrie, probably
item.description: She's so damn proud of herself. :)

item.title: Bottom shelf bonus dump.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
Looking for more memes? Check out discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.

item.title: Orange cat drags himself into the house
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Good folks of Imgur, it’s that time of year again. My teacher friend is one of many where she provides the inner city children with supplies. Underfunded schools and teachers are forced to provide out of pocket. I’m sure Elon will help! Prolly not
item.description: Double edit: wishlist sold out!!! In just hours. Imgur you’re awesome! Edit: Front page! Thanks good people. I appreciate you! Her supply wishlist is below. https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/3MWJEDIPETGCA?ref_=wl_share
item.dc:creator: Franklin666

item.title: This isn't 100% accurate.
item.description: I'm not a fan of Porsches at all. If I've got that kinda money and want something German I'd go for a BMW.

item.title: He became celebrity in an instant.
item.dc:creator: Offernedis

item.title: Ow my intestines.
item.description: So my wife made me a crab sushi bowl with the kind of artificial crab that contains some crab. First time I’ve ever had it. Within minutes I was in terrible pain. Edit: we didn’t know that I was allergic to crab MV Edit: I have an appointment with an allergy specialist to check for crab and fish allergies.
item.dc:creator: Kairuf

item.title: It’s like the stars aligned cause I really am supposed to be a teacher.
